news.headline: Palantir secures $618.9M Army contract for AI and data enhancements, $400.7M over 4 years.
news.summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:PLTR) stocks are up in premarket trading on Thursday following the announcement of an extended partnership with the U.S. Army. The company revealed that it will continue providing the Army Vantage capability for the “Army Data Platform.” This new agreement is worth $400.7 million over four years, with a possible maximum value of $618.9 million. The objective of this extended partnership is to effectively utilize data throughout the Department of the Army, facilitating enhanced integration.

news.headline: Beko achieves highest ESG score in DHP Household Durables Industry for 6th year, with impressive 89/100 rating.
news.summary: For the sixth year in a row, Beko, a renowned company in consumer durables and electronics, has retained its top position by scoring an impressive 89 out of 100 for its commitment to sustainability. This achievement solidifies Beko's reputation as a global leader in promoting environmentally friendly practices. The accomplishment was announced in Istanbul on December 19, 2024.

news.headline: Major publication reports on the importance of fair wages for workers.
New Era Helium to ring Nasdaq opening bell on Jan 2, 2025, beginning trading year, marking success in 2024.
news.summary: Midland, TX-based New Era Helium, Inc. (NASDAQ: NEHC) is set to ring the opening bell at Nasdaq on January 2, 2025, marking the start of the new year. The company is an exploration and production firm that extracts helium from natural gas reserves in the Permian Basin. The year 2024 has been significant for New Era Helium, as they achieved milestones and completed their business operations successfully. The selection by Nasdaq reflects the company's growth and market presence.

news.headline: Amy E. Dahl, 50, elected to EMCOR Group, Inc. Board of Directors effective Dec 18, 2024.
news.summary: EMCOR Group, Inc. disclosed the appointment of Amy E. Dahl, aged 50, as a new member of the Company’s Board of Directors, effective from December 18, 2024. Ms. Dahl currently serves as the Vice President of International Business & Strategy at The Toro Company (“Toro”), which trades on the NYSE under the ticker symbol TTC. Toro is a prominent global supplier of inventive solutions for outdoor settings, encompassing turf and landscape care, snow and ice upkeep, and underground utility development.

news.headline: Global Graphene Market to reach $2.94 billion by 2029 at 24.0% CAGR, driven by demand in various industries and technological advancements in manufacturing processes. Key players include Graphenea S.A, First Graphene, NanoXplore Inc. Drivers: growing demand; Restraints: difficulty in mass production; Opportunities: rising demand in energy storage applications. Bulk Graphene segment to grow with highest CAGR; Graphite to have largest share in terms of value.
news.summary: The global graphene market is projected to grow significantly, reaching $2.94 billion by 2029 from $1.00 billion in 2024, with a CAGR of 24.0% from 2024 to 2029. The demand for graphene is increasing in various industries like electronics, automotive, aerospace, and construction. The market is benefiting from technological advancements in manufacturing processes. Key players in the market include Graphenea S.A, First Graphene, NanoXplore Inc., among others. Drivers of market growth include demand in key end-use industries, while challenges include difficulties in mass production and lack of standardization. The bulk graphene segment is expected to grow at the highest CAGR, with graphite holding the largest share. 358 market data tables, 57 figures, and 295 pages are included in the study.

news.headline: Global spice and herb market expected to reach US$275.01 billion by 2034. North America leads with US$38.55 billion in 2024.
news.summary: The global spice and herb market is valued at US$ 172.08 billion in 2024, with a projected 4.8% CAGR through 2034. The food processing industry drives this growth, utilizing spices in products like seasonings and snacks. North America leads due to demand for organic and functional spices, with China comprising 9% of East Asia’s market share. By 2034, the market is expected to reach US$ 275.01 billion globally. Powder/granule spice sales will grow at 3% CAGR, while South Korea’s spice and herb demand is forecasted to hit US$ 14.67 billion by 2034. The herb segment holds a 5% revenue share in 2024.

news.headline: BigBear.ai to exchange $182.3 million of existing 6.00% convertible notes due 2026 for new 6.00% convertible notes in 2029.
news.summary: BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BBAI) based in Columbia, Maryland, revealed on December 19, 2024, that it has engaged in privately negotiated exchange agreements known as the Exchange Agreements with a select group of holders of its 6.00% convertible senior notes due 2026 (referred to as Existing Convertible Notes). Through these agreements, BigBear.ai is set to exchange about $182.3 million in total principal amount.

news.headline: Organon's CEO and CFO to present at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on January 13th.
news.summary: CEO Kevin Ali and CFO Matthew Walsh of Organon will participate in a fireside chat at the upcoming 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Monday, January 13th. The event will take place in Jersey City, New Jersey.

news.headline: Real Brokerage Inc. (NASDAQ: REAX) releases its first Sustainability Report, highlighting progress towards sustainable business practices.
news.summary: A technology platform reshaping real estate industry, The Real Brokerage Inc. (NASDAQ: REAX) based in Toronto and New York, has unveiled its inaugural Sustainability Report. Tamir Poleg, Chairman and CEO of Real, expressed pride in this milestone, emphasizing the company's commitment to responsible business practices and sustainability in the real estate sector. The report highlights the progress made so far and outlines plans for a sustainable future. This announcement signifies a significant move towards promoting eco-friendly practices in the industry.

news.headline: Realbotix Corp. reports strong 2025 outlook, highlights growth in AI, robotics, cryptocurrency holdings. CEO Andrew Kiguel optimistic.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, Realbotix Corp. (TSX-V: XBOT) (Frankfurt Stock Exchange: 76M0.F) (OTC: XBOTF), a prominent developer of humanoid robots and AI companions, has released its business forecast for 2025. CEO Andrew Kiguel expressed optimism for the upcoming year, highlighting growth in companionship products, advancements in AI technology, and investments in cryptocurrency. The company saw significant transformations in 2024 with ventures into AI and robotics, a rebranding, and a name change, showcasing a strategic shift towards futuristic technologies.

news.headline: Dynacor Group Inc. (TSX: DNG) raises dividend by 14.3%, to C$0.01333 per share for January 2025, payable on Jan 17.
news.summary: In Montreal, Dynacor Group Inc. (TSX: DNG) has revealed a 14.3% rise in the monthly dividend payment for January 2025, set at C$0.01333 per common share (or annual C$0.16 per common share). Shareholders of record as of January 9, 2025, are set to receive this dividend on January 17, 2025. This marks the fifty-eighth (58th) dividend and the forty-eighth (48th) monthly dividend payment issued by the Corporation.

news.headline: HPQ Silicon settles $4.9M debt with PyroGenesis, strengthens balance sheet.
news.summary: In Montreal, on December 19, 2024, HPQ Silicon Inc. announced its approval of settling debts amounting to $4,941,440.16 with PyroGenesis Inc., its technology supplier. HPQ, a technology company focused on green engineering of silica and silicon-based materials, is bolstering its balance sheet with this move. The settlement was approved by the Corporation’s Board of Directors. HPQ is listed on TSX-V as HPQ, OTCQB as HPQFF, and FRA as O08.

news.headline: ZenaTech’s ZenaDrone relocates to Arizona to manufacture US Defense drones with Quantum Computing technology.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, ZenaTech, Inc. (NASDAQ: ZENA) (FSE: 49Q), a tech firm focused on AI drone solutions powered by Quantum Computing, Drones as a Service, and enterprise SaaS, shared that its subsidiary ZenaDrone has relocated to a manufacturing plant in Phoenix, Arizona. This move aims to design US Defense and NATO drones, promoting the production of drones manufactured in the United States. The new facility will house manufacturing, assembly, research and development, sales, pilot, and training teams. Furthermore, it includes an aeronautical test range site for showcasing drone capabilities.

news.headline: BP and Iraq make progress on Kirkuk oil and gas fields redevelopment.
Dragonfly Energy partners with Stevens Transport to transition fleet to hybrid battery solutions, secures large order for All-Electric APUs.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, Dragonfly Energy Holdings Corp. disclosed that they have landed a significant purchase order for their Battle Born® All-Electric APUs from Stevens Transport, Inc., a major temperature-controlled freight carrier in North America. The order underscores Stevens Transport's dedication to adopting innovative and environmentally friendly transportation solutions. This collaboration marks a crucial point in Stevens Transport's effort to spearhead the use of cutting-edge technology and sustainability in the trucking sector. The family-owned full truckload carrier, operating extensively across North America, is keen on superior technology, operational efficiency, and environmental responsibility. Dragonfly Energy is recognized for its expertise in energy storage and battery technology, and listed as Nasdaq: DFLI.

news.summary: In recent statistics, it was reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. This drop equates to approximately 500,000 individuals finding employment. Additionally, the economy saw a growth of 3.2% in the last quarter, surpassing expectations. The stock market also experienced a rise, with the main indexes climbing by 2.5% on average. These positive indicators have led to increased optimism among analysts and investors regarding the future economic outlook.

news.headline: Euro Tech Holdings Company Limited (Nasdaq: CLWT) reports 8.8% decrease in revenue to US$7,259,000 for 1H 2024.
news.summary: Euro Tech Holdings Company Limited, listed on Nasdaq under the ticker CLWT, has released its unaudited financial results for the six months leading up to June 30, 2024. During this period, the company recorded a revenue of US$7,259,000, representing an 8.8% decline compared to the previous period.

news.headline: Amesite's NurseMagic™ AI boosts marketing reach to key markets, with meteoric rise in social media engagement in B2C/B2B healthcare, improving sales.
news.summary: A company is experiencing significant growth in its outreach and interaction by expanding its business-to-consumer (B2C) and business-to-business (B2B) sales through an AI-driven solution specifically tailored for the healthcare industry. This initiative has resulted in a substantial increase in customer connections and sales figures. The company's approach underscores the effectiveness of integrating AI technology in boosting sales and customer engagement, with an impressive rise in both B2C and B2B metrics.

news.headline: Mandalay Resources finds new gold domain at Björkdal mine in Sweden; discovery of North Zone Below Marble.
news.summary: Mandalay Resources Corporation recently announced significant progress in their near mine exploration at Björkdal operation in Sweden. They have discovered the North Zone Below Marble, marking a new milestone for the company. Mandalay, listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange as MND and on OTCQB as MNDJF, shared this update on December 19, 2024. This exploration success signifies growth and potential for Mandalay as they continue to expand their operations.

news.headline: Fancamp Exploration Ltd. receives 1.6M shares of Canadian Gold Resources valued at $830,000, finalizes Robidoux property transfer.
news.summary: Fancamp Exploration Ltd. based in Vancouver, British Columbia, revealed that it has acquired 1,600,000 common shares of Canadian Gold Resources Ltd. The transaction, valued at around $830,000, is a result of a mining claims sale agreement. The deal involves Fancamp's 34 mineral claims linked to the Robidoux property in Quebec's Gaspé region, situated along the Grand Pabos Fault. This area is recognized for its orogenic gold mineralization. For more details, see the press release from January 31, 2023.

news.headline: Pudu Robotics introduces PUDU D9, a full-sized humanoid robot, following the success of PUDU D7.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China, on December 19, 2024, Pudu Robotics, a prominent player in the service robotics industry, introduced its inaugural Full-sized Bipedal Humanoid Robot, the PUDU D9. Created by the Pudu X-Lab, this groundbreaking robot comes after the successful debut of the semi-humanoid robot PUDU D7, marking a new milestone in Pudu Robotics' advancements in this field.

news.headline: Xilio Therapeutics unveils Phase 2 data for Vilastobart (XTX101) in combo with Atezolizumab for Metastatic Colorectal Cancer, and reveals Phase 1 data for XTX301 with improved tolerability profile.
news.summary: Preliminary Phase 1 data for XTX301, a tumor-activated IL-12, have been revealed, showcasing enhanced tolerability when compared to past data related to rhIL-12. This improvement is evidenced by the absence of any dose-limiting toxicities.

news.headline: Lion Electric Co. obtains Creditor Protection under CCAA in Montreal; key info: NYSE: LEV, TSX: LEV, Superior Court of Quebec.
news.summary: Montreal-based Lion Electric Company (NYSE: LEV, TSX: LEV), known for producing all-electric medium and heavy-duty urban vehicles, revealed that the Superior Court of Quebec (Commercial Division) has recently made a significant ruling. The announcement was made on December 19, 2024.

news.headline: Altimmune (Nasdaq: ALT) to join Nasdaq Biotechnology Index (Nasdaq: NBI) on Dec. 23, 2024.
news.summary: Altimmune, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company based in Gaithersburg, Maryland, revealed on December 19, 2024, that it is set to be included in the Nasdaq Biotechnology Index (Nasdaq: NBI). The company, listed on Nasdaq under the ticker ALT, is currently in the clinical stage of its operations. The addition to the NBI index is scheduled to take place before the market opens on Monday, December 23, 2024.

news.headline: Positive Phase IIb study by Palatin for Type 2 Diabetic Nephropathy with 71% efficacy at 6 months.
news.summary: An open-label study was conducted to assess the safety, tolerability, and effectiveness of bremelanotide in individuals with Type 2 diabetic nephropathy. The study revealed positive results after 6 months, with 71% of patients experiencing a more than 30% decrease in the urine protein to creatinine ratio (UP/Cr). This percentage represents a substantial portion of the patients enrolled in the study, showcasing promising outcomes for the treatment of this condition.

news.summary: An all-cash proposal of $1.67 per share has been made, signifying a 58% increase over O3 Mining's closing price on December 11, 2024. The offer has received unanimous approval from the Board and Special Committee of O3 Mining and has been backed by shareholders holding 39% of the total outstanding shares of O3 Mining. Shareholders are advised to consider...

news.headline: Large 3D chargeability anomaly identified at Silverback Copper-Gold Project in Ontario by VR Resources. #mining #geology
news.summary: On August 15th, a shocking report revealed that over 2,500 new cases of COVID-19 were recorded in the state. This significant increase brings the total number of active cases to more than 16,000, with a worrying daily positivity rate of 8.6%. In response to this surge, authorities announced the enforcement of stricter preventive measures, including mask mandates in all public spaces and limits on social gatherings to curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, hospitals are reportedly operating at 85% capacity due to the influx of patients, raising concerns about the healthcare system's ability to cope with the growing caseload. Residents are urged to follow guidelines diligently to protect themselves and others from the virus.

news.headline: SweetWater Brewing celebrates 28 years with STS9 at Atlanta Brewery for Anniversary Bash on February 22, 2025.
news.summary: SweetWater is marking its 28th anniversary with a celebratory event featuring the renowned electronic jam band STS9 at its Atlanta Brewery on Saturday, February 22, 2025.

news.summary: A conference call is scheduled to take place on January 23, 2025, at 2:00pm Eastern Time. This call is significant as it will involve key individuals discussing important matters. Participants are advised to mark their calendars for this date and time to ensure their attendance. This conference call presents a valuable opportunity for individuals to engage in fruitful discussions and exchange vital information.

news.headline: XOMA Royalty announces dividends for preferred stock on a quarterly basis.
Midland, in partnership with RTEC, reports results from 15 drill holes out of 28 at Galinée project for lithium.
news.summary: In Montreal, on December 19, 2024, Midland Exploration Inc. (“Midland”) (TSX-V: MD), in collaboration with Rio Tinto Exploration Canada Inc. (“RTEC”), has announced the reception of the final assay results from the initial drilling campaign for lithium on the Galinée project. The primary aim of the 2024 drilling campaign was to assess the Iceberg, White Stripes, Surge, Snow Fox, and White Lightning lithium showings. This update includes findings from the last fifteen (15) drill holes of the total twenty-eight (28) done in 2024. The Galinée project, situated about 5 kilometers east of the Adina lithium deposit possessed by Winsome Resources (“Winsome”), is completely owned by Midland. The project is governed by an option agreement inked with RTEC in June 2023 and amended in April 2024.

news.headline: Martyn Buttenshaw joins Stardust Power's Board of Directors, enhancing leadership with valuable expertise.
Survey finds healthcare & life sciences sector optimistic as it approaches 2025, according to FTI Consulting.
Indonesia considers significant reductions to nickel production to drive prices up. #mining #Indonesia #nickel #prices
U.S. AmCham China President optimistic about trade in China; discusses evolving relations.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, Michael Hart, President of the American Chamber of Commerce in China (AmCham China), discussed the changing economic and trade dynamics between China and the United States in an interview with Beijing Review. Hart provided valuable perspectives on the opportunities arising from this evolving relationship.

news.headline: Castle Island Ventures' Nic Carter doubts US creating Bitcoin reserve; Matthew Sigel of VanEck calls it "Loserthink."
news.summary: Nic Carter, a Founding Partner at Castle Island Ventures, has raised doubts about the U.S. setting up a strategic Bitcoin reserve during the upcoming Trump administration, citing potential risks to the dollar's global dominance. This viewpoint has faced criticism from Matthew Sigel, Head of Digital Assets Research at VanEck, who strongly rebuked Carter's stance as "Loserthink" in a direct response on social media. In an interview with Bloomberg, Carter explained his support for Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) but expressed reluctance towards the U.S. government signaling a departure from its current monetary framework. He delved into the intricacies of defining a "strategic reserve," differentiating between simply retaining seized Bitcoin and actively procuring more assets.

news.headline: US stock futures rise after Fed rate cut; futures up for all major indices.10-year yield at 4.54%, 2-year at 4.32%. Market reacts to 'healthy' tariff news. GDP revisions and inflation data to be released soon. Stocks plunged in last session. Dow fell by over 1,100 points.
news.summary: The U.S. stock futures rose in premarket trading on Thursday after a previous decline following the Federal Reserve's hawkish stance. The 10-year Treasury note had a 4.54% yield, while the two-year note yielded 4.32%. The Fed cut interest rates by 0.25% to 4.25%-4.5%, signaling only two possible rate cuts in 2025. The probability of no interest rate change for the upcoming Jan. 31, 2025, decision was at 91.4%. GDP revisions were set to reveal if the economy maintained its estimated 2.8% growth rate. Key economic data, including the November PCE inflation index, was awaited. In premarket trading, major indices were up, with the S&P 500 ETF Trust rising 0.52%. In the previous session, the Dow Jones fell over 1,100 points, due to economic indicators like the current account deficit of $310.9 billion and declining housing starts. All S&P 500 sectors closed in the red, with consumer discretionary, real estate, and communication services seeing significant losses.

news.headline: SKF launches Gen AI tool, SKF Product Assistant, for customers to access technical info more efficiently.
news.summary: In Sweden's Gothenburg, on December 19, 2024, SKF introduced a new tool called SKF Product Assistant, powered by generative artificial intelligence (Gen AI), geared towards aiding customers in accessing accurate technical information smoothly. Accessible on the SKF website, this AI tool aims to provide efficient support to customers.

news.headline: Polyrizon appoints Dr. Michal Meir as Senior Director of Regulatory and Clinical Affairs preparing for a clinical trial for PL-14 in 2025.
news.summary: Raanana, Israel - December 19, 2024 - Polyrizon Ltd. (Nasdaq: PLRZ), a biotech company focusing on intranasal hydrogels, has named Dr. Michal Meir, a Senior Consultant at MedTech SME Ltd., as the new Senior Director of Regulatory and Clinical Affairs. Dr. Meir, with more than ten years of experience in medical devices and pharmaceuticals, will play a key role in preparing for the upcoming clinical trial of PL-14 scheduled for 2025. This strategic hire highlights Polyrizon's commitment to strong regulatory strategies, clinical management, and product development in the industry.

news.headline: Self-made billionaire Thomas Peterffy, 80, fled Hungary in 1965, founded Interactive Brokers, has a wealth of over $15 billion.
news.summary: Thomas Peterffy, aged 80, is not like many billionaires who inherit wealth; he is the self-made founder and chairman of Interactive Brokers. In 1965, Peterffy escaped Hungary and moved to the US. He has successfully built his fortune through hard work and dedication. This story showcases a unique journey of perseverance and success in the face of adversity.

news.summary: Many individuals are finding it challenging to remain optimistic in the near future due to persistent inflation, increases in taxes, and elevated interest rates.

news.headline: Blackline Safety Corp. (TSX: BLN) to release Q4 and year-end 2024 financial results on Jan 16, 2025, with a conference call at 11:00 am ET.
news.summary: In Calgary, Canada, Blackline Safety Corp. (TSX: BLN), a prominent provider of connected safety technology globally, has revealed plans to unveil its financial outcomes for the fiscal fourth quarter and year ending 2024 before the market's opening on Thursday, January 16, 2025. The management team is set to conduct a conference call and webcast to delve into the financial results at 11:00 am Eastern Time on the aforementioned day. The conference call is scheduled for Thursday, January 16, 2025.

PetScreening ranked 151 on the Deloitte Technology Fast 500 List, showing growth in rental-housing market.
news.summary: Charlotte, North Carolina - On December 19, 2024, PetScreening, a company providing free pet policy management software to property owners and managers in the rental housing market, revealed its improved ranking, showcasing the company's ongoing expansion. The software has emerged as the top choice in the industry.

news.headline: Microbix reported record product sales for Q4 and fiscal 2024, with revenues of $25.4 million and net earnings of $3.5 million. Antigen sales grew by 44% to $13.8 million, and QAPs by 38% to $7.0 million. Q4 revenue was $6.3 million, a 48% increase from Q4 2023. Gross margin percentage was 61% for 2024. Operating income for 2024 was $3.9 million, up from a loss in 2023. Cash provided by operating activities was $4.3 million, compared to cash used in operating activities in 2023.
news.summary: Microbix Biosystems Inc. reports record revenues for its fiscal year and fourth quarter ended September 30, 2024. In 2024, revenues were $25.4 million with a net income of $3.5 million, up significantly from $16.5 million in 2023. Sales of test ingredients and quality assessment products grew by 42% for the year. Antigen sales increased by 44% to $13.8 million, while QAP sales grew by 38% to $7.0 million. Gross margin percentage improved from 45% in 2023 to 61% in 2024. Operating income for 2024 was $3.9 million compared to a loss in 2023. Q4 revenue reached $6.3 million, a 48% increase from Q4 2023. Antigen revenues were up 50% and QAP revenues rose by 42%. Q4 gross margin percentage improved to 55% from 33% in 2023. Operating income for Q4 was $710,778, a significant improvement from a loss in Q4 2023. Cash provided by operating activities in 2024 was $4.3 million compared to a negative cash flow in 2023. Microbix ended 2024 with a current ratio of 7.15 and a debt-to-equity ratio of 0.35.
